steps.title: Distribute each term
steps.content:
Multiply each term in $d-5$ by each term in $7d^2-4$. This keeps every product from the two parentheses.
$$(d-5)(7d^2-4)=d(7d^2-4)-5(7d^2-4)$$

steps.title: Combine the products
steps.content:
Distribute inside both parts, then combine the four terms.
$$d(7d^2-4)=7d^3-4d$$
$$-5(7d^2-4)=-35d^2+20$$
$$7d^3-4d-35d^2+20$$

steps.title: Write in standard order
steps.content:
Put the terms in descending powers of $d$.
$$7d^3-35d^2-4d+20$$
The answer is C.
